title: Studies on Epidemiology and Management of Phytophthora blight (Phytophthora drechsleri Tucker f. sp. cajani) of Pigeonpea [Cajanus cajan(L.) Millsp.]
abstract:
Phytophthora blight of Pigeonpeaincited by Phytophthora drechsleri Tucker f.sp.cajaniis a potentially important disease of Pigeonpea after fusarium wilt (Fusarium
udum Butler) and Pigeonpea sterility mosaic disease(Pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus). Periodical survey conducted at ICRISAT fields during kharif 2012 and 2013 indicated that in kharif 2012 disease incidence ranged from 0.0 to 59.0 per cent whereas in kharif2013 disease incidence ranged from 0.0 to 55.0 percept. Disease incidence was correlated with weather parameters, among all, cumulative rainfall, maximum 
temperature and maximum relative humidity showed positive correlation. Further, regression analysis showeda linear positive relationship between per cent disease incidence with cumulative rainfall and maximum relative humidity...
